claim_boundary: This proves legal land play and fixed-output mana abilities for the accepted shapes. It does not close T3.5 or semantically verify cards.
source_binding: The kernel, interpreter, smoke harness, tests, specification, and this evidence record are committed together.
production_path: Action::PlayLand validates active player, priority, empty-stack main phase, hand source, land characteristics, and one play per turn
basic land subtypes compile intrinsic mana abilities without card-name branches
explicit tap_self plus fixed add_mana abilities compile to ActivatedAbilityDefinition
Action::RegisterActivatedAbility and Action::ActivateAbility resolve the mana ability without the stack
all actions run invariant, player-view, zone-conservation, and deterministic-hash checks
fail_closed_boundaries: mana alternatives such as {U} or {B} require an explicit choice and remain unsupported
creature mana abilities remain unsupported in smoke until a post-summoning-sickness turn is synthesized
mixed or non-mana activated abilities remain unsupported

verification.result: pass: all workspace unit, integration, and doc tests
pass: forge-core 97, forge-cards 11, forge-testkit 29 across library and binary targets

verification.command: cargo clippy --offline -p forge-core -p forge-cards -p forge-testkit --all-targets -- -D warnings

verification.result: expected exit 2 because unsupported definitions remain; 547 passed, 19535 unsupported, 0 failed
